title: helianthemum virgatum subsp. ciliatum
intro: Helianthemum virgatum subsp. ciliatum, also known as Rockrose or Frostweed, is a flowering plant species within the Cistaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and fight infections. The health benefits of Helianthemum virgatum subsp. ciliatum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
